checks.msg: PASS: door_coverage — every active connects_to edge between active locations carries both directed door rows; an archived endpoint is excluded; a broken direction surfaces by name and heals via materialize_doors; an empty world reaches an explicit 'no edges to verify' pass

PASS: location_type_classified — every active location's type is catalogued with a non-NULL interior/exterior classification; an archived location's uncatalogued type never surfaces; missing, NULL, and out-of-vocab classifications all FAIL by name
